0 AND 57
1 I 0
2 I 1

7 I 6

Applying to 00110000
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 0
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 0
Output
0 AND 57 = AND(I 5,I 7) = AND(0,0) = 0
1 I 0 = 0
2 I 1 = 0
3 I 2 = 1
4 I 3 = 1
5 I 4 = 0
6 I 5 = 0
7 I 6 = 0

\boxed{00011000}
